Off Calendar Aug-11-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlemnet Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Walter Angus MacDonald, 408.269.0286 of the Law Offices of Walter Angus MacDonald appearing via Zoom for Plaintiffs Walter A. MacDonald Jr. et al.
Michael Mclaughlin, 415.665.9753 of Mclaughlin Sanchez appearing via Zoom for Defendants Roxanne Locher et al.

Hearing Held. Mr. MacDonlad's declaration was discussed and the matter was argued. Mr. Mclaughlin raises the issue of attorney's fees. The Court states that attorney fees were not in the notice of motion. Mr. McLaughlin states that the settlement included an attorney fee provision. The Court states that if the settlement agreement is enforced than Plaintiff can request reasonable attorney's fees. Mr. MacDonald objects to the attorney fee request. He states that they are not warranted and that the Plaintiff did not act in bath faith and that the request was not in the motion.

The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT ROXANNE C. LOCHER, SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE UNDER THE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlemnet Agreement is Granted. Mr. McLaughlin to prepare the order. The order shall include the escrow account of Mr. MacDonald's choosing and attorney's fees as requested by Plaintiff. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
